'''KR:''' chorongie2 |checkboxAutoTeams=Yes |checkbox2=No |role=Jungler |issub1=No |istrainee1=No |issub2=No |istrainee2=No |issub3=No |istrainee3=No |issub4=No |istrainee4=No |issub5=No |istrainee5=No |checkbox3=No |stream=https://www.twitch.tv/AnDa |facebook=https://www.facebook.com/AnDa0803 |twitter=AnDa |instagram=anda |discord=https://discordapp.com/invite/sQ6gWsq |deeplol=https://www.deeplol.gg/pro/AnDa |checkboxSuppressOrgNavbox=No |checkboxSBS=Yes |checkboxTOCR=Yes |text=He was previously known as '''Chorong'''. |checkbox-res=No |checkboxPrev=Yes |checkboxIsSub=No |prev1=Top }} ==Biography== ===2016 Season=== '''Chorong''' joined NA Challenger team [[Astral Authority]] for the [[NA Challenger Series/2016 Season/Spring Qualifiers/Open Qualifier|NACS Open Qualifier]]. The team made it to the [[NA Challenger Series/2016 Season/Spring Qualifiers|final qualifier round]], renaming to [[Samadder Gaming]]. After qualifying, the team renamed to [[Dream Team]]. Dream Team finished the season in fifth place, losing an automatic tiebreaker with [[Team Liquid Academy]] due to head-to-head record. They missed out on the [[NA Challenger Series/2016 Season/Spring Playoffs|playoffs]] but received higher seeding for the [[NA Challenger Series/2016 Season/Summer Qualifiers|summer qualifier]] due to finishing ahead of [[Enemy]]. == Trivia == * His ID '''AnDa''' is a reference to ''StarCraft'' player NaDa and his own name (Andy). * His previous ID '''Chorong''' comes from [[wikipedia:en:Apink|Apink]] member Park Cho-rong. * Is the cousin of [[Balls]]. * Achieved Global Elite rank in ''CS:GO''. {{PlayerStatsTrivia}} == Tournament Results == {{PlayerResults|show=overviewpage}} {{PlayerShowmatchResults|show=overviewpage}} {{PlayerResults1v1|show=overviewpage}} ==Media== {{PlayerMedia}} === Images === {{PlayerProfileGallery}} {{PlayerPageEnd}}
